agent_trace.summary: [规划中] SQLite WAL恢复任务已分解为万户级配额，技术执行待命

tumen_quota.总目标: 恢复SQLite WAL文件中的6条记录，使总记录数达到11条

万户级配额.约束: 确保salt值校验通过，WAL帧可被SQLite应用

万户级配额.配额: 分3路并行诊断：1) WAL头校验 2) 帧头salt比对 3) 数据库schema分析
万户级配额.约束: 不可逆操作前必须备份

万户级配额.配额: 具体修复执行：修正WAL salt值、强制checkpoint、验证记录数

updates.decomposition_rule: 1:10逐级分解 - 万户定战略方向，千户设计诊断路径，百户执行具体技术操作，十户验证输出格式

reporting_cycle.万户汇报: 每完成1个技术阶段（诊断/修复/验证）即上报
reporting_cycle.千户汇报: 每发现1个关键线索（salt不匹配/帧损坏/wal模式异常）即上报
reporting_cycle.百户汇报: 每完成1次文件修改操作即上报

技术执行路径.关键风险: WAL文件可能物理损坏或salt值被恶意篡改，需准备回退方案
技术执行路径.mitigation: 保留原文件副本，从base 5条记录逐步重建

acceptance.判据1: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test.db 返回 11

agent_trace.summary: [Executing] Decomposing SQLite WAL recovery task into 10 mingghan-level subtasks

mingghan_allocations.scope: Diagnose WAL header corruption
Verify salt-0 and salt-1 between WAL header and frame headers
Check frame header magic number and checksums
Read base DB schema to understand record structure
Parse all WAL frames manually
Identify which frames have invalid checksums
Fix corrupted salt values or checksums in WAL file
Verify SQLite can apply recovered WAL
Confirm all 11 records are present
Write /workspace/recovered.json with sorted records

risks: WAL file may have multiple corruption points requiring sequential fixes
No tools available in current environment - requires tool execution capability
Frame checksum algorithm needs careful implementation

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

event.summary: [Executing] Decomposing SQLite WAL recovery task into 10 mingghan-level subtasks

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

mingghan_allocations.scope: Diagnose WAL header corruption
Verify salt-0 and salt-1 between WAL header and frame headers
Check frame header magic number and checksums
Read base DB schema to understand record structure
Parse all WAL frames manually
Identify which frames have invalid checksums
Fix corrupted salt values or checksums in WAL file
Verify SQLite can apply recovered WAL

risks: WAL file may have multiple corruption points requiring sequential fixes
No tools available in current environment - requires tool execution capability

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 千户任务T101_wal_recovery-01已按1:10拆分为10个百户子任务，需jaghun_level执行。技术执行需文件读写工具支持。

jaghun_allocations.task: 环境诊断 - 检查test.db和test.db-wal文件状态、权限、大小
WAL头部诊断 - 读取WAL header，验证Magic Number和Salt-1/Salt-2值
WAL帧头解析 - 逐帧读取frame header，检查page号、commit标志、校验和
WAL-db一致性检查 - 对比WAL salt值与database header中的salt值
基线数据查询 - 使用SQL查询当前5条基础记录，确认数据内容
修复方案制定 - 根据诊断结果确定WAL修复策略
WAL文件修复 - 修正Salt值/校验和/损坏帧
checkpoint执行 - 运行PRAGMA wal_checkpoint或正常关闭触发WAL应用
数据验证 - 查询确认11条记录已恢复，验证更新和新插入数据
输出recovered.json - 按id排序输出全部11条记录到/workspace/recovered.json

blockers.reason: 工具不可用 - 用户标注'no tools'，当前无文件读写/代码执行工具可用
blockers.evidence: Available Tools列表为空，无法执行二进制文件分析、SQLite操作、JSON写入等底层操作
